.status-bar.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, white 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(white, color-mix(in srgb, white 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, white 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(white, color-mix(in srgb, white 65%, transparent))

div.callout-title.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
